brand = ({
  purple: "#44375B",
  taupe:  "#AEA793",
  green:  "#5E9175",
  blue:   "#448BBC",
  maroon: "#A33348",
  orange: "#E5A65F"
})

grupoColors = ({
  "Mariguana":              brand.green,
  "Cocaina":                brand.blue,
  "Opioides tradicionales": brand.orange,
  "Metanfetamina":          brand.purple,
  "Fentanilo":              brand.maroon
})

labColors = ({
  "COCAINA":       brand.blue,
  "HEROINA":       brand.orange,
  "METANFETAMINA": brand.purple
})

metodoColors = ({
  "Fumigación": brand.blue,
  "Manual":     brand.green
})

// Grupos presentes en incineraciones (sin fentanilo), en orden
incGrupos = ["Mariguana", "Cocaina", "Opioides tradicionales", "Metanfetamina"]

plotStyle = ({fontFamily: "Lato, system-ui, sans-serif"})
viewof periodo_inc = Inputs.select(
  ["1990-2000", "2001-2010", "2011-2020", "2021-2024"],
  {label: "Período", value: "2011-2020"}
)

viewof grupo_inc = Inputs.select(
  ["Todos", "Mariguana", "Cocaina", "Opioides tradicionales", "Metanfetamina"],
  {label: "Grupo de droga"}
)
{
  const mexico = await FileAttachment("mexico_states.geojson").json()

  const groupColors = grupoColors

  const groupLabels = {
    "Mariguana":              "Mariguana",
    "Cocaina":                "Cocaína",
    "Opioides tradicionales": "Opioides tradicionales",
    "Metanfetamina":          "Metanfetamina"
  }

  const allData = transpose(inc_map_data)
  const filtered = allData
    .filter(d => d.periodo === periodo_inc)
    .filter(d => grupo_inc === "Todos" || d.grupo === grupo_inc)

  return Plot.plot({
    projection: {type: "mercator", domain: mexico},
    width: 700,
    height: 500,
    style: plotStyle,
    r: {range: [2, 18]},
    color: {
      domain: incGrupos,
      range:  incGrupos.map(g => groupColors[g]),
      legend: true,
      label:  "Grupo",
      tickFormat: d => groupLabels[d] ?? d
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.geo(mexico, {fill: "#e8e8e8", stroke: "#aaa", strokeWidth: 0.5}),
      Plot.dot(filtered, {
        x: d => +d.lon,
        y: d => +d.lat,
        r: "n_eventos",
        fill: d => groupColors[d.grupo] ?? "gray",
        fillOpacity: 0.65,
        stroke: "white",
        strokeWidth: 0.3,
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.municipio}, ${d.estado}\n${groupLabels[d.grupo] ?? d.grupo}: ${d.n_eventos} eventos`
      })
    ]
  })
}
{
  const btn = document.createElement("button")
  btn.textContent = "⬇ Descargar datos (CSV)"
  btn.style.cssText = [
    "padding: 6px 14px", "font-size: 0.85em", "cursor: pointer",
    "border-radius: 4px", "border: 1px solid #aaa", "background: #f5f5f5", "margin-top: 6px"
  ].join(";")

  btn.onclick = () => {
    const rows = transpose(inc_map_data)
      .filter(d => d.periodo === periodo_inc)
      .filter(d => grupo_inc === "Todos" || d.grupo === grupo_inc)
    const header = ["estado","municipio","grupo","periodo","n_eventos","lon","lat"]
    const labels = ["Estado","Municipio","Grupo","Período","Eventos","Longitud","Latitud"]
    const csv = [
      labels.join(","),
      ...rows.map(d => header.map(k => d[k] ?? "").join(","))
    ].join("\n")
    const blob = new Blob(["﻿" + csv], {type: "text/csv;charset=utf-8;"})
    const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
    const a    = document.createElement("a")
    a.href     = url
    a.download = `incineraciones_mapa_${periodo_inc.replace("-","_")}.csv`
    a.click()
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
  }

  return btn
}
